title: Company Names Tribunal decision: S&P Cash and Carry Limited
body: "Application number 5228  Applicant S&P Global Inc. objected to the name used by S&P Cash and Carry Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of S&P Cash and Carry Limited is changed to 15802243, Ltd. "
